sentences.arabic: جَاءَ الْمَطَرُ فَجْأَةً بَعْدَ صَيْفٍ طَوِيلٍ وَجَافٍّ.
sentences.translation: Kiša je iznenada stigla nakon dugog i suhog ljeta.
sentences.translationEn: The rain came suddenly after a long, dry summer.

sentences.arabic: وَقَفَ النَّاسُ عِنْدَ النَّوَافِذِ يَنْظُرُونَ إِلَيْهِ بِسَعَادَةٍ وَدُهْشَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Narod je stao kraj prozora i gledao je s radošću i čuđenjem.
sentences.translationEn: People stood at their windows watching it with joy and wonder.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ الشَّاعِرُ: «يَا مَطَرُ، أَنْتَ رِسَالَةٌ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ تَقُولُ إِنَّ الْأَرْضَ لَمْ تُنْسَ.»
sentences.translation: Pjesnik je napisao: „O kišo, ti si poruka s neba koja kaže da zemlja nije zaboravljena."
sentences.translationEn: The poet wrote: "O rain, you are a message from the sky saying the earth has not been forgotten."

sentences.arabic: رَقَصَتِ الأَطْفَالُ فِي الشَّارِعِ وَفَتَحُوا أَفْوَاهَهُمْ لِيَشْرَبُوا قَطَرَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca su plesala po ulici i otvarala usta da piju njene kapi.
sentences.translationEn: Children danced in the street and opened their mouths to drink its drops.

sentences.arabic: غَسَلَ الْمَطَرُ الأَشْجَارَ وَالشَّوَارِعَ، وَتَنَفَّسَتِ الْمَدِينَةُ مِنْ جَدِيدٍ.
sentences.translation: Kiša je oprala drveće i ulice, i grad je ponovo slobodno disao.
sentences.translationEn: The rain washed the trees and streets, and the city breathed again.
